title: That Old Black Magic

startPoint.en: Speak to Lady Grey in the City of Um's bandstand.
startPoint.es: Habla con Lady Grey en el kiosco de música de City of Um.

items.name: Everlight trumpet
items.display: Restored Everlight trumpet 28 Everlight silvthril 24 goldrune

items.name: Glyphs
items.display: Glyphs for ensoul trumpet ritual 2 Elemental I, 1 Change I, and 1 Commune I 13 basic ghostly ink and 2 regular ghostly ink from scratch

items.name: Elemental I
items.display: 2 Elemental I, 1 Change I, and 1 Commune I 13 basic ghostly ink and 2 regular ghostly ink from scratch

items.name: Basic ghostly ink
items.display: 13 basic ghostly ink and 2 regular ghostly ink from scratch

items.name: Animated drumsticks
items.display: Animated drumsticks (may obtain during the quest)

kills: Dragith Nurn (level 26; must be killed with necromancy)
Multiple kills of Hermod, the Spirit of War (level 732) May be skipped if you have already obtained the animated drumsticks.
May be skipped if you have already obtained the animated drumsticks.

rewards.display: If you have fully completed all 4 subquests and the quest "That Old Black Magic", you will have received the following: 85 vessel souls Necromancy XP lamp for 5,000 Necromancy experience Necromancy XP lamp for 7,500 Necromancy experience Necromancy XP lamp for 12,500 Necromancy experience Necromancy XP lamp for 20,000 Necromancy experience

guideNote.en: This quest is a hub for several sub-quests, each already listed separately in this app with its own step-by-step guide. There isn't a single walkthrough for the hub itself — check the wiki page for the full overview.
guideNote.es: Esta misión es un resumen que agrupa varias sub-misiones, cada una ya listada por separado en esta app con su propia guía paso a paso. No existe una guía única para la misión en sí — consulta la página del wiki para ver el resumen completo.
